description: Provenance and integrity records for the Berv et al. (2026) empirical artifacts added with the avian-skeleton and simulation-study vignettes.

berv_archive_v1.title: Supplementary data archive for Rates of passerine body plan evolution in time and space

berv_article_2026.title: Rates of passerine body plan evolution in time and space

zenodo_cc_by_4_0.upstream_status: CC-BY-4.0, from metadata.license.id in the Zenodo v1.0.0 record.
zenodo_cc_by_4_0.reuse_action: Reuse is permitted under CC BY 4.0 with attribution and the other license conditions.

nature_rights_not_established.upstream_status: No figure-specific license or reuse permission is established by the repository metadata or the cited article metadata recorded here.
nature_rights_not_established.reuse_action: Consult the article rights statement and rights holder before redistributing the published figure outside the bifrost package.

transformation.method: Package-local copy of the assembled 2057-species comparative matrix described in avian-skeleton-part-1.Rmd.
transformation.script: No copy or transformation script is recorded in this repository.

transformation.method: Package-local copy of the time-scaled passerine tree described in avian-skeleton-part-1.Rmd.
transformation.script: No copy or transformation script is recorded in this repository.

transformation.method: Compact focal search retaining the final mapped tree, fitted BMM rates, shifts, IC summaries, VCVs, and IC weights while omitting full candidate fits and proposal history.
transformation.script: No focal-artifact transformation script is recorded in this repository.

transformation.method: Compact bundle retaining mapped trees, fitted BMM rates, shifts, IC summaries, VCVs, and IC weights for 12 sensitivity runs.

artifacts.source_location: runs_with_posthoc, all_vars_cors, and posthoc_integration_pgls objects produced by TemporalAnalyses.R

transformation.method: Compact post-hoc covariance, pGLS, PCA, module, settings, and provenance bundle.

artifacts.source_location: Schema-3 cache constructed directly by data-raw/build_simulation_study_vignette_cache.R from validated empirical GIC and BIC grid RDS inputs.

transformation.method: Construct the schema-3 simulation vignette cache directly from validated empirical GIC and BIC grid RDS inputs, including full recovery metrics and fuzzy-balanced-accuracy tuning summaries.

artifacts.source_location: Published Figure 1, as identified by the caption in vignettes/avian-skeleton-part-1.Rmd.

transformation.method: Precomputed publication figure included by the vignette.
transformation.script: No export or image-transformation script is recorded in this repository.

transformation.method: Precomputed plot produced from icTrajectory() with the documented display settings.
transformation.script: Documented plotting recipe: vignettes/avian-skeleton-part-1.Rmd#focal_ic_trajectory_code; no automated image-export script is recorded.

artifacts.source_location: Compact focal min10.ic20.gic mapped tree and fitted BMM regime rates.

transformation.method: Precomputed arc tree using Fisher breaks and the reversed RdYlBu palette.
transformation.script: Documented plotting recipe: vignettes/avian-skeleton-part-1.Rmd#bodyplan_rate_map_code; no automated image-export script is recorded.
